violations.text: Cole slaw was observed held at 52-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Milk Cooler #1 located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 51F. At time of inspection no TCS foods were in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The handwashing sink in the kitchen is being used as a mop sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Establishment must discontinue using the handwashing sink as a mop sink. Per person in charge, there is another mop sink that can be used. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Cucumber and tomato salad was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit in the fruit & veggie bar. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, salad was just placed in the bar. Salad was relocated to a cold-hold unit. Establishment does not cold hold the salad. Establishment must cold hold all time/temperature control for safety foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent dropping in the dry storage area and near the 3-bay sink. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must contact pest control services and clean up droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Per person in charge, dishwasher is not in use and they are using the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
